headline: DMV Fantasy: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: DMV Fantasy carries a championship-lineup C-AVI average of 73.91, led by Jayden Daniels, Saquon Barkley, and George Kittle. The clearest lineup pressure point is the FLEX slot held by Rachaad White at 57.1 C-AVI.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Jayden Daniels (96.2), Saquon Barkley (92.0), and George Kittle (79.5).

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
sections.body: Rachaad White is the lowest C-AVI starter in the verified championship lineup at 57.1. Any acquisition should clear that lineup threshold.

sections.title: Depth and Flexibility
sections.body: The team file contains 11 offensive players, with 3 outside the modeled starting eight. The offensive roster D-AVI average is 66.94.

sections.title: Availability
sections.body: All 11 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active.
